---
title: "Lecture 7 Quiz: HTML Forms & Form Elements"
jupyter: julia-1.12
---

::: {.callout-note}
Review before quiz:
[Lectures](/lectures/lecture-07.qmd) | [Week 2 Content](/content/week-02.qmd) | [Lab 2](/labs/lab-02.qmd) | [Assignment 1](/assignment/01-assignment.qmd)
:::

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
using QuizQuestions
```

## Lecture 7 Self-Check

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `<form>`", "B. `<field>`", "C. `<input-group>`", "D. `<submit>`"]
question = "Question 1: Which tag is used as the container for form controls?"
answer = 1
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. GET hides data in body", "B. POST appends data in URL", "C. POST sends data in request body", "D. GET is always encrypted"]
question = "Question 2: Which statement correctly describes the POST method?"
answer = 3
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `required`", "B. `readonly`", "C. `disabled`", "D. `multiple`"]
question = "Question 3: Which attribute makes a form field mandatory before submission?"
answer = 1
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. Radio buttons", "B. Checkboxes", "C. Text input", "D. Date input"]
question = "Question 4: Which control type is used when users can select multiple options?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. For styling only", "B. For accessibility and input association", "C. For image upload", "D. For data encryption"]
question = "Question 5: Why should a `<label>` be associated with form inputs?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```
